patch.value:
## Context
docs/COMMANDS.md line 126: 'pm close-many --rollback close-many-20260604-abc123'
Unit test coverage (close-command.spec.ts line 543) tests checkpoint creation but not restoration.
update-many-command.spec.ts line 132 tests rollback for update-many.

The mutation-checkpoint module is in vitest coverage include (src/core/checkpoint/mutation-checkpoint.ts line 94 of vitest.config.ts) but the rollback restore path relies on close command integration behavior that is not unit-testable in isolation.

## Acceptance criteria
- An integration test exercises the full close-many flow: create items, close-many with reason, capture checkpoint-id, rollback, verify items restored to pre-close state
- Test uses sandbox PM_PATH (node scripts/run-tests.mjs pattern)

## Evidence
tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts line 543; tests/unit/update-many-command.spec.ts line 132; docs/COMMANDS.md lines 125-129
Add integration test for close-many --rollback checkpoint restore

close-many supports --rollback <checkpoint-id> to undo a bulk close operation, and this is documented in COMMANDS.md. The unit test at tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts line 543 tests 'closes matched open items, skips already-terminal matches, and emits a rollback checkpoint' but does not test the rollback restore path. No integration test exercises the full close-many->checkpoint->rollback restore cycle end-to-end.

- An integration test exercises the full close-many flow: create items, close-many with reason, capture checkpoint-id, rollback, verify items restored to pre-close state
- Test uses sandbox PM_PATH (node scripts/run-tests.mjs pattern)

Integration test creates items, close-many --filter-tag --reason (matched/closed=2, checkpoint id captured), verifies closed, close-many --rollback <id> (restored=2), verifies items reopened with close_reason cleared, and an out-of-filter item untouched.
close-many rollback restore path exercised end-to-end with sandbox PM_PATH.
1 integration test; apply + rollback output shapes asserted; passes.
Added tests/integration/close-many-rollback.integration.spec.ts covering the full close-many -> checkpoint -> rollback restore cycle.
